name: formspec-site
description: Formspec documentation website built with Astro

scripts.copy:studio: rm -rf public/studio public/chat && mkdir -p public/studio public/chat && cp -r ../packages/formspec-studio/dist/* public/studio/ && mv public/studio/chat.html public/chat/index.html && cp -r public/studio/assets public/chat/assets
scripts.predev: npm run build:studio && npm run copy:studio
scripts.prebuild: npm run build:studio && npm run copy:studio
